#displaying yolo7 inference result
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt
import cv2
img = cv2.imread("/content/drive/MyDrive/DataUpload/content/yolov7/runs/detect/exp3/1-100-_jpg.rf.2fce1afaf907a82f9b73144aee7565cf.jpg")
img = cv2.cvtColor(img, cv2.COLOR_BGR2RGB)
plt.imshow(img)
plt.title("Yolo7 Detection Result")
plt.show()

from ultralytics import YOLO
# Load a model
yolo9_model = YOLO("yolov9c.pt")  # load a pretrained model (recommended for training)
print("Yolo9 Pretrained model loaded")

#loading yolo12 algorithm
%cd /content
from ultralytics import YOLO
# Load a model
yolo12_model = YOLO("yolo12m.pt")  # load a pretrained model (recommended for training)
print("Yolo12 Pretrained model loaded")

plt.imshow(img)
plt.title("Yolo12 Training Graph")
plt.show()
In [10]:
#function to detect fastener using yolo9 or 12
def detectYoloFastener(img, yolo_model, CONFIDENCE_THRESHOLD, GREEN):
  labels =  ['Allen Bolt', 'Blind-Pop Rivet', 'Cap Nut', 'Coupling Nut',
             'Drywall Anchor', 'Dyna Bolt', 'Eye Bolt', 'Flange Bolt', 'Flange Nut',
             'Flat Washer', 'Hanger Bolt',  'Hex Bolt', 'Hex Head Anchor', 'Hex Nut',
             'Lag Screw Bolt', 'Lock Nut', 'Lock Washers-Split Washer',
             'Mechanical Expansion Anchor','Nails', 'Screw Hook', 'Snap-Head Rivet',
             'Square Nut', 'Stud Bolt', 'Threaded Rivet', 'U Bolt', 'Wing Nut']
  detections = yolo_model(img)[0]
  # loop over the detections
  for data in detections.boxes.data.tolist():
    # extract the confidence (i.e., probability) associated with the detection
    confidence = data[4]
    cls_id = data[5]
    # filter out weak detections by ensuring the
    # confidence is greater than the minimum confidence
    if float(confidence) >= CONFIDENCE_THRESHOLD:
      xmin, ymin, xmax, ymax = int(data[0]), int(data[1]), int(data[2]), int(data[3])
      cv2.rectangle(img, (xmin, ymin) , (xmax, ymax), GREEN, 2)
      cv2.putText(img, labels[int(cls_id)]+" "+str(round(confidence,2)), (xmin, ymin+20),  cv2.FONT_HERSHEY_SIMPLEX,0.7, (255, 0, 0), 2)
  return img
In [12]:
#detect using yolo9
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt
import cv2
from ultralytics import YOLO

#yolo confidence threshold to detect animal species
yolo_model = YOLO("/content/drive/MyDrive/DataUpload/model/yolo9_best.pt")
img = cv2.imread("/content/drive/MyDrive/DataUpload/Data/images/valid/1-100-_jpg.rf.2fce1afaf907a82f9b73144aee7565cf.jpg")
img = detectYoloFastener(img, yolo_model, 0.30, (0, 255, 0))
img = cv2.cvtColor(img, cv2.COLOR_BGR2RGB)
plt.imshow(img)
plt.title("Yolo9 Detection Result")
plt.show()

0: 640x640 1 Allen Bolt, 1 Dyna Bolt, 1 Flat Washer, 1 Hex Nut, 1 Lock Washers-Split Washer, 1 Mechanical Expansion Anchor, 1 Stud Bolt, 49.0ms
Speed: 3.0ms preprocess, 49.0ms inference, 1.2ms postprocess per image at shape (1, 3, 640, 640)

#detect using yolo12
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt
import cv2
from ultralytics import YOLO

#yolo confidence threshold to detect animal species
yolo_model = YOLO("/content/drive/MyDrive/DataUpload/model/yolo12_best.pt")
img = cv2.imread("/content/drive/MyDrive/DataUpload/Data/images/valid/1-100-_jpg.rf.2fce1afaf907a82f9b73144aee7565cf.jpg")
img = detectYoloFastener(img, yolo_model, 0.30, (0, 255, 0))
img = cv2.cvtColor(img, cv2.COLOR_BGR2RGB)
plt.imshow(img)
plt.title("Yolo12 Detection Result")
plt.show()

#training and evaluating retinanet model
%cd /content/drive/MyDrive/DataUpload/content/pytorch-retinanet
import os
if os.path.exists('/content/drive/MyDrive/DataUpload/content/pytorch-retinanet/model_final.pt') == False:
  !python train.py --dataset csv --csv_train /content/drive/MyDrive/DataUpload/RetinanetDataset/train_annotations.csv --csv_classes /content/drive/MyDrive/DataUpload/RetinanetDataset/classes.csv --csv_val /content/drive/MyDrive/DataUpload/RetinanetDataset/valid_annotations.csv --epochs 25
else:
  !python csv_validation.py --csv_annotations_path /content/drive/MyDrive/DataUpload/RetinanetDataset/valid_annotations.csv --model_path /content/drive/MyDrive/DataUpload/content/pytorch-retinanet/model_final.pt --images_path /content/drive/MyDrive/DataUpload/RetinanetDataset/valid --class_list_path /content/drive/MyDrive/DataUpload/RetinanetDataset/classes.csv

#restart session after installing detectron
# You may need to restart your runtime prior to this, to let your installation take effect
# Some basic setup
# Setup detectron2 logger
import detectron2
from detectron2.utils.logger import setup_logger
setup_logger()

# import some common libraries
import numpy as np
import cv2
import random
from google.colab.patches import cv2_imshow

# import some common detectron2 utilities
from detectron2.engine import DefaultPredictor
from detectron2.config import get_cfg
from detectron2.utils.visualizer import Visualizer
from detectron2.data import MetadataCatalog
In [4]:
#training faster RCNN algorithm
from detectron2.data.datasets import register_coco_instances
from detectron2.data import MetadataCatalog
from detectron2.data import DatasetCatalog
import random
from detectron2.utils.visualizer import Visualizer
import numpy as np
import os
import numpy as np
import json
from detectron2.structures import BoxMode
import itertools
from detectron2.engine import DefaultTrainer
from detectron2.config import get_cfg

register_coco_instances("train", {}, "/content/drive/MyDrive/DataUpload/RCNNDataset/train_annotations.coco.json", "/content/drive/MyDrive/DataUpload/RCNNDataset/train")
register_coco_instances("val", {}, "/content/drive/MyDrive/DataUpload/RCNNDataset/val_annotations.coco.json", "/content/drive/MyDrive/DataUpload/RCNNDataset/valid")
COCO_train_metadata = MetadataCatalog.get("train")
dataset_dicts = DatasetCatalog.get("train")

COCO_val_metadata = MetadataCatalog.get("val")
val_dataset_dicts = DatasetCatalog.get("val")

cfg = get_cfg()
cfg.merge_from_file("/content/detectron2_repo/configs/COCO-Detection/faster_rcnn_R_50_FPN_3x.yaml")
cfg.DATASETS.TRAIN = ("train",)
cfg.DATASETS.TEST = ("val",)
cfg.DATALOADER.NUM_WORKERS = 2
cfg.MODEL.WEIGHTS = "detectron2://COCO-Detection/faster_rcnn_R_50_FPN_3x/137849458/model_final_280758.pkl"  # initialize from model zoo
cfg.SOLVER.IMS_PER_BATCH = 2
cfg.SOLVER.BASE_LR = 0.00025
cfg.SOLVER.MAX_ITER = 100
cfg.MODEL.ROI_HEADS.BATCH_SIZE_PER_IMAGE = 128
cfg.MODEL.ROI_HEADS.NUM_CLASSES = 26
cfg.OUTPUT_DIR = "/content/drive/MyDrive/DataUpload/FRCNNModel"

os.makedirs(cfg.OUTPUT_DIR, exist_ok=True)
trainer = DefaultTrainer(cfg)
trainer.resume_or_load(resume=False)
trainer.train()

  )
  (proposal_generator): RPN(
    (rpn_head): StandardRPNHead(
      (conv): Conv2d(
        256, 256, kernel_size=(3, 3), stride=(1, 1), padding=(1, 1)
        (activation): ReLU()
      )
      (objectness_logits): Conv2d(256, 3, kernel_size=(1, 1), stride=(1, 1))
      (anchor_deltas): Conv2d(256, 12, kernel_size=(1, 1), stride=(1, 1))
    )
    (anchor_generator): DefaultAnchorGenerator(
      (cell_anchors): BufferList()
    )
  )
  (roi_heads): StandardROIHeads(
    (box_pooler): ROIPooler(
      (level_poolers): ModuleList(
        (0): ROIAlign(output_size=(7, 7), spatial_scale=0.25, sampling_ratio=0, aligned=True)
        (1): ROIAlign(output_size=(7, 7), spatial_scale=0.125, sampling_ratio=0, aligned=True)
        (2): ROIAlign(output_size=(7, 7), spatial_scale=0.0625, sampling_ratio=0, aligned=True)
        (3): ROIAlign(output_size=(7, 7), spatial_scale=0.03125, sampling_ratio=0, aligned=True)
      )
    )
    (box_head): FastRCNNConvFCHead(
      (flatten): Flatten(start_dim=1, end_dim=-1)
      (fc1): Linear(in_features=12544, out_features=1024, bias=True)
      (fc_relu1): ReLU()
      (fc2): Linear(in_features=1024, out_features=1024, bias=True)
      (fc_relu2): ReLU()
    )
    (box_predictor): FastRCNNOutputLayers(
      (cls_score): Linear(in_features=1024, out_features=27, bias=True)
      (bbox_pred): Linear(in_features=1024, out_features=104, bias=True)
    )
  )
)

In [5]:
# Look at training curves in tensorboard for fastercnn
%load_ext tensorboard
%tensorboard --logdir /content/drive/MyDrive/DataUpload/FRCNNModel
In [7]:
#get FRCNN accuracy
import json
with open("/content/drive/MyDrive/DataUpload/FRCNNModel/metrics.json", "rb") as file:
  data = file.read()
file.close()
data = data.decode()
metrics = data.split("\n")
metrics = metrics[0]
metrics = json.loads(metrics)
for key, value in metrics.items():
  if "accuracy" in key and value > 0:
    print("FRCNN Accuracy "+str(value))

FRCNN Accuracy 0.16796875
FRCNN Accuracy 0.0234375
In [9]:
#detection using FasterRCNN
from detectron2.engine import DefaultPredictor
cfg.MODEL.WEIGHTS = "/content/drive/MyDrive/DataUpload/FRCNNModel/model_final.pth" # path for final model
predictor = DefaultPredictor(cfg)
im = cv2.imread("/content/drive/MyDrive/DataUpload/RCNNDataset/valid/1-100-_jpg.rf.2fce1afaf907a82f9b73144aee7565cf.jpg")
outputs = predictor(im)
v = Visualizer(im[:, :, ::-1],metadata=COCO_val_metadata,scale=0.8)
out = v.draw_instance_predictions(outputs["instances"].to("cpu"))
print("FRCNN Detection Result")
cv2_imshow(out.get_image()[:, :, ::-1])

[01/18 11:11:22 d2.checkpoint.detection_checkpoint]: [DetectionCheckpointer] Loading from /content/drive/MyDrive/DataUpload/FRCNNModel/model_final.pth ...
FRCNN Detection Result
In [10]:
#training MRCNN algorithm
cfg = get_cfg()
cfg.merge_from_file("/content/detectron2_repo/configs/COCO-InstanceSegmentation/mask_rcnn_R_50_FPN_3x.yaml")
cfg.DATASETS.TRAIN = ("train",)
cfg.DATASETS.TEST = ("val",)
cfg.DATALOADER.NUM_WORKERS = 2
cfg.MODEL.WEIGHTS = "detectron2://COCO-InstanceSegmentation/mask_rcnn_R_50_FPN_3x/137849600/model_final_f10217.pkl"  # initialize from model zoo
cfg.SOLVER.IMS_PER_BATCH = 2
cfg.SOLVER.BASE_LR = 0.00025
cfg.SOLVER.MAX_ITER = 100
cfg.MODEL.ROI_HEADS.BATCH_SIZE_PER_IMAGE = 128
cfg.MODEL.ROI_HEADS.NUM_CLASSES = 26
cfg.OUTPUT_DIR = "/content/drive/MyDrive/DataUpload/MRCNNModel"
cfg.MODEL.MASK_ON = False

os.makedirs(cfg.OUTPUT_DIR, exist_ok=True)
trainer = DefaultTrainer(cfg)
trainer.resume_or_load(resume=False)
trainer.train()

GeneralizedRCNN(
  (backbone): FPN(

    (fpn_lateral3): Conv2d(512, 256, kernel_size=(1, 1), stride=(1, 1))

    )
  )
  (proposal_generator): RPN(
    (rpn_head): StandardRPNHead(
      (conv): Conv2d(
        256, 256, kernel_size=(3, 3), stride=(1, 1), padding=(1, 1)
        (activation): ReLU()
      )
      (objectness_logits): Conv2d(256, 3, kernel_size=(1, 1), stride=(1, 1))
      (anchor_deltas): Conv2d(256, 12, kernel_size=(1, 1), stride=(1, 1))
    )
    (anchor_generator): DefaultAnchorGenerator(
      (cell_anchors): BufferList()
    )
  )
  (roi_heads): StandardROIHeads(
    (box_pooler): ROIPooler(
      (level_poolers): ModuleList(
        (0): ROIAlign(output_size=(7, 7), spatial_scale=0.25, sampling_ratio=0, aligned=True)
        (1): ROIAlign(output_size=(7, 7), spatial_scale=0.125, sampling_ratio=0, aligned=True)
        (2): ROIAlign(output_size=(7, 7), spatial_scale=0.0625, sampling_ratio=0, aligned=True)
        (3): ROIAlign(output_size=(7, 7), spatial_scale=0.03125, sampling_ratio=0, aligned=True)
      )
    )
    (box_head): FastRCNNConvFCHead(
      (flatten): Flatten(start_dim=1, end_dim=-1)
      (fc1): Linear(in_features=12544, out_features=1024, bias=True)
      (fc_relu1): ReLU()
      (fc2): Linear(in_features=1024, out_features=1024, bias=True)
      (fc_relu2): ReLU()
    )
    (box_predictor): FastRCNNOutputLayers(
      (cls_score): Linear(in_features=1024, out_features=27, bias=True)
      (bbox_pred): Linear(in_features=1024, out_features=104, bias=True)
    )
  )
)

# Look at training curves in tensorboard for MRCNN
%load_ext tensorboard
%tensorboard --logdir /content/drive/MyDrive/DataUpload/MRCNNModel

The tensorboard extension is already loaded. To reload it, use:
  %reload_ext tensorboard
In [12]:
#print MRCNN Accuracy
import json
with open("/content/drive/MyDrive/DataUpload/MRCNNModel/metrics.json", "rb") as file:
  data = file.read()
file.close()
data = data.decode()
metrics = data.split("\n")
metrics = metrics[0]
metrics = json.loads(metrics)
for key, value in metrics.items():
  if "accuracy" in key and value > 0:
    print("MRCNN Accuracy "+str(value))

MRCNN Accuracy 0.203125
MRCNN Accuracy 0.0234375
In [13]:
#detection using MRCNN algorithm
from detectron2.engine import DefaultPredictor
cfg.MODEL.WEIGHTS = "/content/drive/MyDrive/DataUpload/MRCNNModel/model_final.pth" # path for final model
predictor = DefaultPredictor(cfg)
im = cv2.imread("/content/drive/MyDrive/DataUpload/RCNNDataset/valid/1-100-_jpg.rf.2fce1afaf907a82f9b73144aee7565cf.jpg")
outputs = predictor(im)
v = Visualizer(im[:, :, ::-1],metadata=COCO_val_metadata,scale=0.8)
out = v.draw_instance_predictions(outputs["instances"].to("cpu"))
cv2_imshow(out.get_image()[:, :, ::-1])
